title: Replace finished-work sidecar with source-owned reopeners
goal: Implement #537 by deriving finished-work reopen mappings from source-owned external work items when available and removing the checked-in finished-work evidence sidecar from this repo.
Ensure stale copied title/status values in the legacy sidecar are not treated as checked-in truth.
non_goals: Do not remove legacy compatibility loading for host repos that already have finished-work evidence.
Do not make GitHub required for core planning.
Do not implement audit artifact or generated mirror compression in this slice.

intent.outcome: finished-work inspection uses source-owned reopen relationships or compact derived mappings instead of a checked-in status/title mirror
intent.constraints: tracker-agnostic, archive remains primary closeout evidence, stale sidecar facts cannot override source evidence
intent.latitude: may update external evidence normalization, finished-work inspection, docs, tests, inventory, ignore rules, and planning state
intent.escalation: stop if the change requires mandatory provider calls in planning package code

execution.next_step: archive #537 and continue the parent lane with #538
execution.proof: passed: workspace CLI tests, planning installer tests, root/package ruff, inventory check, planning surfaces check, contract tooling check, planning doctor

invariants: archived execplans remain primary finished-work evidence
external tracker evidence is optional and provider-agnostic after normalization
legacy sidecar status/title are not authority when source evidence exists

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: stop checking in reconstructable artifact residue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: finished-work reopenings can be represented by source issue bodies/links and external cache instead of a repo sidecar mirror
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Source-owned reopens are parsed into external evidence, stale sidecar values are overridden by external source truth, the tracked sidecar is removed, and summary remains quiet.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for #537; #538, #539, and #540 remain in the parent lane.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Finish the current lane, then take a break.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: complete reconstructable-artifact compression without switching to unrelated review findings
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify stale sidecar status/title cannot drive finished-work truth

execution_bounds.allowed paths: finished-work inspection and evidence normalization surfaces plus tests/docs/planning state
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_bounds.stop before touching: audit artifact distillation or generated mirror compression

stop_conditions.stop when: tracked finished-work sidecar is removed and source-owned reopens are consumed
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: provider-specific logic would enter planning package core

context_budget.live working set: #537, finished-work inspection code/tests, external evidence normalization
context_budget.context-shift triggers: before commit or after validation failure

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: read-only review of sidecar replacement approach

invariants: Do not add GitHub-specific parsing to planning package core.
Legacy sidecar remains compatibility input but is ignored by git in this repo.
Source-owned external status/title wins over copied sidecar facts.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: External evidence items may carry provider-agnostic reopens refs.
Finished-work evidence sidecar is deprecated/legacy and not checked in by default.
open_questions_to_close: Does the current GitHub issue body format carry enough source-owned reopens information?
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
uv run ruff check src tests
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Tracked finished-work evidence sidecar is removed from the repo.
External evidence can carry reopens refs into finished-work inspection.
Tests prove stale sidecar status/title cannot override external source truth.
#537 closes and parent lane routes to #538.

execution_run.what happened: External intent normalization now derives provider-agnostic reopens refs from source-owned issue sections; finished-work inspection consumes those refs and treats legacy sidecar values as compatibility-only when external source truth exists.
execution_run.scope touched: finished-work inspection, external evidence normalization, docs, tests, structured-file inventory, gitignore, planning state
execution_run.changed surfaces: removed tracked .agentic-workspace/planning/finished-work-evidence.json; added ignored cache policy; updated CLI/planning code, docs, and tests
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #537 complete; parent reconstructable-artifact-policy should route to #538 next.
execution_run.next step: archive plan, close #537, commit, push, then continue #538

finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact summary/proof and local cache; did not make GitHub mandatory in planning core

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: tests and checks listed in execution_run.validations run passed; compact summary reported derived_follow_up_candidate_count=0 and clean planning surface health.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Replace finished-work evidence sidecar with source-owned links or derived inspection.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: tracked sidecar removed, source-owned reopens parsed into external evidence, stale sidecar override behavior covered by tests, docs updated
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #538, #539, #540 for remaining reconstructable artifact residue classes

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve only context that is expensive to rediscover and necessary for safe continuation.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does finished-work inspection stop depending on a stale sidecar mirror?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #537 removed the finished-work sidecar residue but the parent lane still includes audit artifacts, generated mirrors, and duplicate payload copies.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml routes the parent lane to #538; archive retains #537 proof.
closure_check.reopen trigger: finished-work inspection again depends on checked-in copied issue status/title evidence instead of source-owned links or generated cache

durable_residue.learned constraint: finished-work reopens should live in source-owned links or compact provider-agnostic refs, not copied title/status mirrors

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Finished-work reopening evidence no longer depends on a checked-in stale sidecar mirror in this repo.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: workspace CLI tests, planning installer tests, ruff, inventory check, planning surfaces check, contract tooling check, and planning doctor passed
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: archive proof plus docs/contract updates; no Memory promotion needed
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): finished-work inspection docs and structured-file inventory updated; no checked-in Memory change

signals dismissed: No new package friction surfaced beyond the existing parent-lane child issues.
